member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.CastHelper.CastHelperExt
member.summary: A partial class containing multiple helper functions for casting objects.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.CastHelper.CastHelperExt.TryCast``2(``0,``1@)
member.summary: Try to cast an object into an object of a specific type.
member.typeparam: The type of the input object.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.InvokeHelper.InvokeHelperExt
member.summary: A partial class containing multiple helper functions for invoking functions and methods.
A partial class containing multiple helper functions for invoking functions.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.InvokeHelper.InvokeHelperExt.HasMethod(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a specific type has a public method with the given name.
member.param: The method name to look for.
member.returns: True if the method exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.InvokeHelper.InvokeHelperExt.HasMethod(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a specific object's runtime type has a public method with the given name.
member.param: The method name to look for.
member.returns: True if the method exists, false otherwise.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.InvokeHelper.InvokeHelperExt.InvokeMethod``2(``0,System.String,System.Object[]@)
member.summary: Invoke a non void method on an object (as extension).
member.param: The method parameters as an object array.
member.returns: The result of the invoked method.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.InvokeHelper.InvokeHelperExt.InvokeMethod``2(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Invoke a non void method on an object (as extension).
member.returns: The result of the invoked method.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.InvokeHelper.InvokeHelperExt.InvokeMethod``1(``0,System.String,System.Object[]@)
member.summary: Invoke a void method on an object (as extension).
member.param: The method parameters as an object array.

member.summary: Adds an object to the list only if it is not already present, using the default equality comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the objects in the list.
member.returns: True if the object was added, false if it was already present.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Extensions.ListHelper.ListHelperExt.AddUnique``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},``0,System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0})
member.summary: Adds an object to the list only if it is not already present, using the specified equality comparer.
member.typeparam: The type of the objects in the list.
member.returns: True if the object was added, false if it was already present.
